A '''[[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]]''' was onboard a [[J-1 shuttle]] when [[Cade Skywalker]] and [[Shado Vao]] left [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].
